---
title: "Data Science Frontiers workshop announcement"
date: 2025-10-17
description: "Workshop. Dean Knox and I will deliver a talk and workshop on applications of the autobounds software at Data Science Frontiers (Society and Politics) in New York."
categories:
  - workshops
  - software
---

Dean Knox and I will deliver a talk and workshop on applications of the new autobounds software at the Data Science Frontiers (Society and Politics) conference in New York.
